prestazioni: Replace the original 1.4L inline-4 SCM (Société de Construction Mécanique) Type U-16 engine with a fully balanced and blueprinted SCM U-16 block featuring forged Mahle pistons (85mm bore, 9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JP Performance to handle 8,500 RPM reliably. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (280° duration, 12.5mm lift) for optimized high-RPM power delivery.

Install a bespoke Roots-type supercharger system by Sprintex (model S5-2100) with an integrated air-to-water intercooler (custom fabricated by Bell Intercoolers) and a custom intake manifold cast by Mahle to fit the SCM U-16’s unique dimensions. Boost pressure set to 12 psi with a custom wastegate actuator by Turbosmart to avoid over-boosting the vintage block.

Upgrade the ignition system with a fully programmable MSD 8 Plus ignition box, custom-machined distributor housing by Vertex Magnetos, and NGK R847-10 racing spark plugs gapped at 0.018 inches. Pair with a custom 12V lithium-ion battery by Antigravity (ATX-20) to ensure consistent spark under high-RPM conditions.
estetica: Fabricate a custom aluminum body kit by Zagato Milano, replicating the 1921 Brescia race car’s aerodynamic profile but with modern 5052 aluminum alloy for weight reduction. Include a single-piece front splitter with integrated brake cooling ducts and a rear diffuser with carbon fiber strakes (supplied by APR Performance).

Replace the original wooden-spoke wheels with custom 17-inch magnesium alloy wheels by Dymag (model CX-R), wrapped in 4.5x17 front and 5.0x17 rear Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (205/45 R17 front, 225/40 R17 rear) for period-correct proportions with modern grip. Use custom hub adapters by Wilwood to fit the original Type 13’s drum brake mounting points.

Install a full custom interior by Saddleback Leather, featuring hand-stitched tan leather seats with period-correct diamond-tufting, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip), and a custom aluminum dashboard with analog Jaeger gauges (0-10,000 RPM tachometer, 0-200 psi oil pressure gauge, and 0-300°F water temperature gauge). Replace the original wooden floorboards with carbon fiber panels by Carbon Revolution for weight savings.
